name: Mills Estruturas e Servicos de Engenharia S.A.
summary: Mills Estruturas e Servi√É¬ßos de Engenharia S.A. operates in the infrastructure, construction, and manufacturing industries in Brazil. It rents, sells, imports, and exports steel and aluminum tubular structures, and shoring and access equipment for construction works, as well as reusable concrete formworks; develops related engineering projects; and provides supervisory and optional assembly services. The company also sells, rents, and distributes aerial work platforms and telescopic handlers, and parts and components, as well as provides technical assistance and maintenance services for such equipment. In addition, it engages in the rental, assembly, and disassembling of access tubular scaffolding in industrial areas; and performance of industrial painting, sandblasting, heat insulation, and boilermaker and refractory services, as well as other related services. Mills Estruturas e Servi√É¬ßos de Engenharia S.A. was founded in 1952 and is based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
